title: telemetry-otel — field classification
description: Data that ships out of the application via OTLP. Classified per what appears in span attributes / metric labels.

restricted: academorix.causer_email (only when explicitly enabled + redacted after audit review)
db.statement (query redacted — bind parameters replaced with `?`)

notes: The SpanAttributeRedactor runs BEFORE export. Redaction rules configured in telemetry-otel.redact.keys[] and telemetry-otel.redact.patterns[].
IP addresses are treated as personal data under GDPR when combined with other identifiers. Config option telemetry-otel.redact.ip=true strips http.client_ip in production. Kept in dev for debugging.
SQL bindings NEVER exported — db.statement is the redacted template only (`SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = ?`).
